banner.title: Your jobs and your resume on WhatsApp
banner.description: Get job alerts on your phone and chat with the assistant to optimize your resume on the spot.

modal.title: Enable WhatsApp
modal.description: Enter your number to receive jobs and chat with the assistant via WhatsApp.
modal.error: Could not enable WhatsApp. Please try again.
modal.privacyNote: By enabling it, you agree to the use of WhatsApp as described in our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

codeStep.title: Enter the code
codeStep.description: We sent a 6-digit code to {{number}}. It may take up to 1 minute.
codeStep.codeInvalid: Wrong code. Please check and try again.
codeStep.noPending: Your code expired. Resend to get a new one.
codeStep.numberTaken: This number is already linked to another account.

section.title: Notifications
section.description: Choose where you want to receive job alerts.
section.notOptedInHint: Enable WhatsApp first to be able to pick it as a channel.
section.notOptedInError: Enable WhatsApp first to use it as a channel.
